description: Execute V0.7-M3-A by designing the data models for failure taxonomy, feedback ingestion, retrospective artifacts, and the retry vs. improvement boundary.
scope: Generate a comprehensive design document (tasks/v0.7-m3-a-feedback-taxonomy.md) that defines the taxonomy of failures, how feedback is ingested without breaking governance, the model for retrospective artifacts, and strict rules for distinguishing an automated retry from an escalated improvement-case.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of automation scripts or automatic retries. NO rewriting of the governance/review mechanism. NO .agent-state/ migration. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json semantics.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Executing without an approved M3-A contract.
